title: damalis #1151
definition:
1) a young cow, heifer
    1a) of the red heifer with whose ashes, by the Mosaic law,
        those were to be sprinkled who had become defiled
nasbUsage:

    1a) of the red heifer with whose ashes, by the Mosaic law,
